Represents a chunk of text extracted from a document.

clean(String) - Method in class com.ragcore.adapter.domain.film.ScriptTextCleaner
Cleans raw screenplay text by removing common noise patterns.
clean(String) - Method in class com.ragcore.adapter.domain.general.TextCleaner
Cleans the given raw text by removing common PDF noise.
clean(String) - Method in class com.ragcore.adapter.domain.legal.LegalTextCleaner
Cleans raw legal document text by removing common noise patterns.

Clears all stored chunks from the vector store.

Converts the given text into an embedding vector.

Embeds a list of texts in one batch, returning embeddings in the same order.

Interface for converting text into numerical vector representations (embeddings).

EvalController - Class in com.ragcore.controller
REST controller for running RAG quality evaluations.

EvalQuestion - Class in com.ragcore.model
Represents a single question/answer pair in the RAG evaluation test set.
EvalQuestion(String, String, String, List<String>, List<String>) - Constructor for class com.ragcore.model.EvalQuestion
Constructs an evaluation question.
EvalReport - Class in com.ragcore.model
Aggregated evaluation report summarizing the RAG system's performance across all test questions.
EvalReport(int, double, double, List<EvalResult>) - Constructor for class com.ragcore.model.EvalReport
 
EvalResult - Class in com.ragcore.model
Holds the evaluation result for a single question, including retrieval and answer metrics.
EvalResult(String, String, String, double, double, List<String>, List<String>, List<String>, List<String>) - Constructor for class com.ragcore.model.EvalResult
 
EvalService - Class in com.ragcore.service
Evaluation service that measures the quality of the RAG pipeline.

evaluate(List<EvalQuestion>) - Method in class com.ragcore.service.EvalService
Runs the full evaluation pipeline on the given test set.
extractSectionNumber(String) - Method in class com.ragcore.adapter.domain.legal.LegalSplitter
Extracts a section number from a heading line for use as metadata.

F

floatsToBytes(float[]) - Static method in class com.ragcore.service.vector.SQLiteVectorStore
Converts a float[] to a byte[] (4 bytes per float, big-endian).

Average answer keyword accuracy across all questions (0.0 to 1.0).
getAverageRetrievalHitRate() - Method in class com.ragcore.model.EvalReport
Average retrieval hit rate across all questions (0.0 to 1.0).
